title: Boonchu 2
original_title: บุญชู 2 น้องใหม่
overview: Boonchu did not pass the entrance exam for the university so he went back home. With the help of Head Monk at Suphan, Boonchu was able to return to Bangkok to prepare for his next entrance exam.
